query: ALTER TABLE telegram_accounts ADD COLUMN syncStatus ENUM('idle','syncing','done','error') DEFAULT 'idle', ADD COLUMN lastSyncAt DATETIME NULL, ADD COLUMN syncedDialogs INT DEFAULT 0;
